candidate_check.description: Unauthenticated RPC clients must be restricted from connecting to the RPC server.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Rpc\

Value Name: RestrictRemoteClients

Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 1
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> System >> Remote Procedure Call >> "Restrict Unauthenticated RPC clients" to "Enabled" and "Authenticated".
title: Unauthenticated RPC clients must be restricted from connecting to the RPC server.
